name: claude-companion
description: Use Claude from Codex to review code or delegate tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Run Claude reviews and delegated tasks from Codex
interface.longDescription: Claude Companion lets Codex call the local Claude Code CLI for read-only reviews, repeat-until-pass adversarial reviews, delegated tasks, background jobs, status checks, result retrieval, and cancellation.
defaultPrompt: Run adversarial review, fix findings, and repeat until pass.
Ask Claude to investigate this bug.
